name: colyseus-react
description: Colyseus React integration patterns. Covers raw useEffect connection, RoomContext provider, Zustand network store, singleton ColyseusService, NetworkBridge pattern (state to Zustand), useFrame access for R3F, two-tier update strategy, React Strict Mode protection, and state callback cleanup. Use when integrating Colyseus with React, managing connection lifecycle, bridging server state to UI stores, or building real-time multiplayer UIs.
